steps: File French tax reclaim using Form 5001 with BNP Paribas for EUR 3,744 excess withholding on TTE dividends
Submit proof of Norwegian tax residency and FR-NO treaty entitlement to 15% rate (vs. 30% standard)
Request BNP Paribas process reclaim directly with French tax authorities citing treaty Article on dividend taxation
Follow up within 30 days if no acknowledgment of EUR 3,744 refund processing

references.title: impots.gouv.fr – Form 5001 (Reimbursement of WHT on Dividends)
